hero.title: YouthConnect - National Youth Platform
hero.subtitle: A secure national platform connecting youth, centers, and partners across Moroccan cities. Manage programs, track impact, and empower youth opportunity with a government-grade service.

services.title: Programs & Services for Youth
services.training: Upskilling and vocational programs to prepare youth for the job market.
services.employment: Job placement, internships and employer connections.
services.entrepreneurship: Incubation, mentoring and micro-grants for founders.
services.sports: Local sport programs to engage youth and promote wellbeing.
services.culture: Arts, cultural activities and heritage projects for communities.
services.volunteering: Community volunteering pathways and civic participation.

featured.title: Featured Programs
featured.founder_launch: Founder Launchpad — next cohort opens soon

partners.title: Trusted by public and private partners
